task: get_cookie_secure in sessions.py indexes the config directly, which raises KeyError if the key is missing. Make it tolerate a missing SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE key.
correctness_argument: `.get('SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE', False)` returns False when the key is absent, matching Flask's documented default. Plain-HTTP deployments that never set the key continue to work; the Secure flag is only set when explicitly configured to True.
